title: Retextured Copper
description: Retexture of the copper in vanilla friendly way.
body:
This resource pack changes the texture of copper gear, by giving it more unique shapes and texture.

<details>
<summary>Currently changes:</summary>

- Copper Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel and Hoe 
> ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/544d44af0b77e8fc659a7219cb68ecfb44cddb54.png) 
- Copper Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings and Boots
> ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f08692792e5d76d807d8d557fed0ec34509e114.png)
- Copper Chains
> ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9750707322aed91540fcd6113e26ced88c8c228e.png)
- Copper Lanterns
> ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1113c8575d459a9de478a5330ed9963265f3a894.png)
- Copper Bars
> ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4125f380f23634d50aec3500dccebc509c9a7e46.png)


</details>
